goal: Call the VPC module from dev and prod root modules and set environment-specific values
summary: Phase 2 completed: VPC module is wired into both dev and prod root modules and tfvars files contain required VPC variables.
stepSummaries:
1. Update terraform/environments/dev/main.tf to call vpc module with dev CIDRs and AZs [verified]
  2. Update terraform/environments/prod/main.tf to call vpc module with prod CIDRs and AZs [verified]
  3. Populate terraform/environments/dev/terraform.tfvars with vpc_cidr, public_subnet_cidrs, availability_zones [verified]
  4. Populate terraform/environments/prod/terraform.tfvars with vpc_cidr, public_subnet_cidrs, availability_zones [verified]
